name: hoc/form-field
description: A reusable form-field wrapper HOC that combines a label, input, description, and error message into a single layout unit. Provides FormField, FormFieldLabel, FormFieldInput, FormFieldDescription, and FormFieldErrorMessage primitives. Automatically wires aria-describedby and aria-invalid attributes between the label, input, and error elements for full accessibility. Designed to integrate with validation libraries (Zod, Valibot, etc.) and theme-aware via component-class tokens.
useCases: Registration and checkout forms where each row needs a label, input, helper text, and error
Settings panels with multiple field types (text, select, switch) sharing a consistent layout
Survey builders that dynamically render labeled questions with real-time validation feedback
Multi-step wizards where each step reuses the same field structure across different input types
usage: import { FormField, FormFieldLabel, FormFieldInput, FormFieldDescription, FormFieldErrorMessage } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/form-field"
